title: viola rupestris var. grandiflora
intro: Viola rupestris var. grandiflora, also known as the Large-flowered Rock Pansy, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The Large-flowered Rock Pansy has been traditionally used to promote relaxation and reduce stress, and its health benefits include reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Viola rupestris var. grandiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
